name: Ana Tripunoska
description:
Frontend engineer with 10+ years of experience building fast, accessible web experiences. I specialize in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS — transforming complex designs into pixel-perfect, performant interfaces.

Currently at Valtech, building enterprise-scale web applications with Adobe Experience Manager for global clients.

projects.projectDescription: Interactive app displaying 250+ countries with real-time search, region filtering, and detailed country pages. Implemented debounced search and lazy loading for optimal performance.
Dynamic job board with multi-select category filtering. Built with state management for complex filter logic and smooth animations.
Minimal app fetching random advice from external API. Built with TypeScript for type safety and clean code practices.
Fully responsive landing page with mobile-first approach. Pixel-perfect implementation from Figma design with custom CSS animations.
Modern banking landing page built with utility-first CSS. Features smooth scroll, responsive navigation, and optimized images.

bullet_points: Build reusable UI components for enterprise clients using React, TypeScript, and Adobe Experience Manager
Translate Figma designs into pixel-perfect, responsive interfaces
Optimize web performance through lazy loading, code splitting, and image optimization
Develop and maintain component library in Storybook for team consistency
Conduct code reviews and mentor team members on frontend best practices
Collaborate with cross-functional teams in Agile environment
Developed custom WordPress themes and WooCommerce stores for diverse clients
Built responsive, cross-browser compatible websites from PSD designs
Created custom Liferay portal themes for enterprise clients
Implemented on-page SEO strategies to improve client search visibility
Optimized site performance through caching and asset optimization
Worked directly with designers and backend developers to deliver projects
Maintained and updated web applications
Designed mobile-responsive features
Wrote technical documentation and user guides
Built responsive web pages using Bootstrap framework
Created and maintained CSS stylesheets
Tested websites and documented bugs for development team
Worked with relational databases
Wrote SQL queries for data management
